descriptionZh: 连续均匀输送散装物料设备，处理能力10-350 m³/h。采用高质量皮带结构，精确控制给料速度，低能耗高效率。适用于矿山、电力、水泥等多领域物料输送。
descriptionEn: Continuous bulk material transportation equipment with 10-350 m³/h capacity. Features high-quality belt structure, precise feeding speed control, and low energy consumption. Suitable for material handling in mining, power, cement, and other industries.

features.descriptionZh: 0.1-1.5 m/s无级调速系统，实现精确给料量控制
features.descriptionEn: Infinitely variable speed control (0.1-1.5 m/s) enables precise material feeding rate

features.descriptionZh: 0.75-3 kW高效电机，传动系统优化降低50%能耗
features.descriptionEn: 0.75-3 kW efficient motors with optimized drive system reducing energy consumption by 50%

features.descriptionZh: 特种橡胶皮带设计，使用寿命延长30%，适应恶劣环境
features.descriptionEn: Special rubber belt design extends service life by 30%, suitable for harsh environments

features.descriptionZh: 模块化结构设计，零部件更换快速，降低维护成本
features.descriptionEn: Modular structure for quick component replacement, reducing maintenance costs

features.descriptionZh: 多宽度选择(500-800mm)，适应不同物料特性与处理要求
features.descriptionEn: Multiple width options (500-800mm) to accommodate various material properties and processing requirements

description.zh: 用于地下和露天矿山，将爆破矿石从料仓均匀给入破碎设备。变速设计可根据下游设备调节给料速度，处理能力可达350 t/h。
description.en: Used in underground and open-pit mines to evenly feed blasted ore from silos to crushers. Variable speed design adjusts feeding rate based on downstream equipment requirements, with capacity up to 350 t/h.

description.zh: 火电厂煤炭输送系统关键设备，为锅炉提供均匀给煤。精确调速(0.1-1.5 m/s)确保燃料供应稳定，满足负荷变化需求。
description.en: Key equipment in thermal power plant coal transport systems. Precise speed regulation (0.1-1.5 m/s) ensures stable fuel supply to boilers and accommodates load variations.

description.zh: 为水泥生产线提供原料定量给料及熟料输送。设备可在高粉尘环境长期稳定运行，专用防护设计减少维护需求。
description.en: Provides quantitative feeding of raw materials and clinker transport in cement production lines. Equipment operates stably in high-dust environments with special protective designs minimizing maintenance.

description.zh: 港口散货系统中用于均匀给料船舶装载。宽带设计(最宽800mm)提供大处理能力，可处理煤炭、矿石等多种散装物料。
description.en: Used in port bulk cargo systems for uniform ship loading. Wide belt design (up to 800mm) provides large handling capacity for various bulk materials including coal and ore.
